questions: Is the wound acute or chronic?
If chronic, what are the identified predisposing factors?
If chronic, is infection suspected or confirmed?
If chronic and infection is suspected/confirmed, what microorganism was identified?
If chronic, is the ulcer associated with necrotic tissue or slough?
If chronic, is the ulcer clean and shallow without pus discharge or features of infection?
If chronic, is there bleeding or a cavity in the wound?
If chronic, is the patient diabetic?
